title: OpenAPM v0.1 Requirements Manifest
description: Schema for docs/public/specs/manifests/openapm-v0.1.requirements.yml. The manifest is the machine-readable projection of the HTML req anchors in the spec body. Used by the orphan_check CI gate and the conformance test harness. Ships informatively in v0.1.1 (spec sec.12.6 reservation).

requirements_format_version.description: Version of the manifest's OWN format. Bumped only when the schema below changes. Independent of spec_version.

spec_version.description: Version of the OpenAPM spec this manifest indexes (e.g. v0.1, v0.2).

id.description: Stable requirement id. Forever; mark deprecated, never reuse, never renumber.

keyword.description: RFC 2119 / 8174 normative keyword. Polarity matters for negative-test enforcement (see test_marker_invariants in F16 defer).

conformance_class.description: The conformance class the requirement binds. The field name avoids the Python 'class' builtin shadow.

fixture.description: Optional repo-relative posix path to a fixture under tests/fixtures/spec-conformance/ that exercises this requirement (input-only fixture).

oracle.description: Optional repo-relative posix path to an oracle file (paired input + expected) under tests/fixtures/spec-conformance/. Oracle shape: a single JSON file with top-level keys 'input' and 'expected', OR a directory containing input.* and expected.* siblings.

round_trip_exempt_fields.description: Field names exempt from byte-for-byte round-trip equality (see test_round_trip.py stage-2 carve-out). Diffed structurally instead. Default empty.

notes.description: Optional one-line maintainer note (e.g. 'Registry class; v0.1 ships trust-anchor MUST only, no wire surface').
